block_01: Catch the bounce with the Moving Average
block_02: Moving Average is one of the most basic tools for technical analysis. Yet, it can be very effective – that’s why it's so popular among traders. This indicator is often used in combination with other instruments. However, you may apply it on its own as well – for instance, with the Moving Average Bounce approach.
block_03: This method may help you identify the overall direction of the asset’s price. It monitors the bounces as the price fluctuates to spot trading opportunities and choose the optimal time to make a move.
block_10: What is Trading? Trading vs. Investing
block_11: Learn about the pros and cons of both approaches and understand what makes them different.
block_13: Top 3 Trading Mistakes Novice Traders Make
block_14: Do you know which mistakes are common among new traders? Find out if you are making one of them right now!
